subject: feat: z-index scale, burger menu improvements, cross-tab theme sync, docs cleanup
body:
Z-index scale (glow-props spec):
- Adopted standardized scale across all components
- base 0-10, headers 20, sheets 30, toasts 70, debug 80
- Updated: LocationSearch, floatingSearch, bannerContainer, Toast, DebugPill

Burger menu improvements (glow-props spec alignment):
- e.target === e.currentTarget on backdrop (replaces stopPropagation)
- Escape key handler for web (explicit keydown listener)
- AccessibilityInfo.announceForAccessibility on open
- numberOfLines={1} on menu labels
- maxWidth: 85% on dropdown
- accessibilityRole="button" (disclosure pattern, not ARIA menu)

Cross-tab theme sync:
- storage event listener in useTheme.ts syncs theme_combo and
  theme_dark changes across browser tabs

Docs cleanup:
- CLAUDE.md: updated project status, architecture, component descriptions
- HISTORY.md: added 2026-04-02 entry with all mobile web + spec changes
- TODO.md: added new items (className types, PDF, color-scheme), removed stale
- SESSION_NOTES.md: rewritten with current state

Tags: z-index, burger-menu, theme, accessibility, documentation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-alignment
Semver: minor
